text: Workspace overloads that allocated anyway are gone (luWith/choleskyWith/forLU/forCholesky deleted; qrWith genuinely reuses scratch); BlockJacobi is a real blockwise LU preconditioner (exact-solve at blockSize>=n, construction-time singular detection); lsqr renamed cgnr with honest scaladoc; FactorizationDiagnostics shrunk to populated fields, unreachable LU.isSingular deleted, rankEstimate double-QR deduped; conditionEstimate is now a genuine Hager/Higham 1-norm estimator (one LU + O(few) solves instead of exact inverse). Evidence: testAll 98/98 JVM+JS.
